mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate compresses the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 6.5%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, which boosts corporate earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative or flat in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE crosses below 6.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in housing starts and industrial production indicate broad-based demand recovery, which lifts cyclical equity earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in HOUST and INDPRO do not predict positive S&P 500 60-day forward returns (Rank IC < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: In a rising inflation environment, sustained increases in the federal funds rate signal tightening liquidity, which compresses equity multiples and yields negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of periods where FEDFUNDS rises while CPIAUCSL is above 260.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit balances indicate expanding household purchasing power, which directly supports corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive RSAFS growth fails to predict positive S&P 500 20-day forward returns in more than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production exceeds 105, supply chain capacity constraints bind, causing input cost inflation that erodes equity profit margins and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns remain positive when INDPRO stays above 105 for consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with stable unemployment signals healthy labor demand without wage-push inflation, supporting equity multiples and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive PAYEMS and stable UNRATE fails to predict positive S&P 500 20-day forward returns (Rank IC < 0.04).

mechanism_narrative: During housing market overheating, rapid increases in housing starts crowd out commercial investment and trigger Fed policy shifts, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of instances where HOUST surges >10% quarterly.
